The '''liberation''' of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] was one of the last battles of the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] forces freed [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] from [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] control, and pushed on towards the main Mandalorian strongholds beyond the Republic in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

Additionally, the Republic drove the criminal [[Exchange]] corporation from Taris, at least temporarily, freeing the slaves held by both the Exchange and the Mandalorians. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] personally freed a young [[Cathar/Legends|Cathar]] named [[Juhani]]. It was this act of kindness and nobility that convinced Juhani to attempt training as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].
